variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_annual_battles
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded in Saudi Arabia over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01.

variables.name: threshold_value
variables.description: The calculated threshold (10 * (1 + (historical_annual_battles / 12))) that the recent 30-day battle count must exceed.

variables.name: recent_30day_battles
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded in Saudi Arabia during the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_conflict_escalation
variables.description: A binary indicator of a significant escalation in armed conflict within Saudi Arabia (e.g., renewed Houthi incursions or large-scale internal insurgency) during the target window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_llm_guidance_published
variables.description: Whether the FDA has published final or draft guidance specifically addressing the regulatory framework for generative AI or LLMs in medical devices before March 2026.

variables.name: llm_pccp_submissions
variables.description: The number of Predetermined Change Control Plans (PCCPs) submitted to the FDA for software devices that explicitly mention foundation models or LLMs.

variables.name: clinical_validation_studies_llm
variables.description: The number of peer-reviewed clinical validation studies or registered clinical trials completed for LLM-based diagnostic tools intended for FDA submission.

variables.name: active_de_novo_llm_requests
variables.description: Whether there is at least one active De Novo classification request or 510(k) submission for an LLM-based device currently in the FDA substantive review phase as of late 2025.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: successful_colonization_rate
variables.description: The percentage of treated individuals in whom the BCS3-L1 strain successfully outcompetes and permanently replaces native Streptococcus mutans.

variables.name: lactic_acid_reduction_ratio
variables.description: The factor by which the BCS3-L1 strain reduces the production of lactic acid in the oral biofilm compared to wild-type S. mutans.

variables.name: clinical_study_completion
variables.description: Whether a controlled clinical study with a control group is completed and published by the time of resolution.

variables.name: cavity_incidence_reduction
variables.description: The measured percentage reduction in new dental caries (cavities) over a 4-year period in the treatment group versus the control group.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: february_climatological_warming_trend
variables.description: The difference in average historical daily temperatures between February 8th and February 1st in Mayotte.

variables.name: active_monsoon_trough_presence
variables.description: Whether an active monsoon trough or tropical depression is affecting the weather patterns in the Mozambique Channel on February 8th, causing significant cloud cover and cooling.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: control_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Russia must establish full control over Chasiv Yar, which sits on high ground overlooking the approach to Kostyantynivka, to facilitate an advance.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline
variables.description: The distance in kilometers from the nearest Russian-controlled territory as shown on ISW/DeepState maps to the Kostyantynivka railroad station.

variables.name: severance_of_h32_highway
variables.description: Russia must physically cut or establish fire control over the H32 highway connecting Pokrovsk and Kostyantynivka to isolate the city from southern reinforcements.

variables.name: russian_advance_rate_donbas
variables.description: The average daily rate of territorial gain by Russian forces in the Donetsk sector leading up to the deadline.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: high_level_diplomatic_summits
variables.description: The number of high-level diplomatic summits or ministerial meetings involving at least three of the specified MENA states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) focused on regional security cooperation occurring between February 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: draft_agreement_leaks
variables.description: Whether credible news reports or official leaks emerge regarding a draft multilateral security framework or MOU involving at least three eligible MENA states prior to June 30, 2026.

variables.name: regional_security_threat_index
variables.description: An index representing the perceived level of shared security threats (e.g., maritime piracy, non-state actor aggression) among UAE, Egypt, and Jordan, where 10 is an imminent shared crisis and 1 is stable peace.

variables.name: inter_mena_joint_exercises
variables.description: The number of joint military or counter-terrorism exercises conducted exclusively or primarily by three or more of the eligible MENA states (e.g., Egypt, UAE, Bahrain, Jordan) in the first half of 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: official_removal_action
variables.description: An official executive order, letter of dismissal, or formal legal filing initiated by the President to remove Jerome Powell from his position as Chair or a member of the Board of Governors before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: legal_precedent_establishment
variables.description: The Department of Justice or the White House Counsel issues a formal legal opinion or takes executive action asserting that the 'for cause' protection for independent agencies can be bypassed based on the 'unitary executive' theory.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_divergence
variables.description: The absolute difference between the target federal funds rate and the rate publicly demanded by the Trump administration in the 3 months leading up to May 2026.

variables.name: inflation_rate_exceedance
variables.description: The Year-over-Year Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate in the months preceding the end of Powell's term, representing the economic pressure and justification for executive intervention.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_identity
variables.description: Whether the winner of the 2026 Australian Open is someone other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner.

variables.name: remaining_slams_non_alcaraz_sinner_win_probability
variables.description: The probability (expressed as a percentage) that at least one of the remaining three Grand Slams in 2026 (French Open, Wimbledon, US Open) is won by a player other than Alcaraz or Sinner.

variables.name: top_five_challenger_slam_count
variables.description: The total number of Grand Slam titles won in 2026 by players ranked 3-10 (e.g., Djokovic, Medvedev, Zverev, Shelton).

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_injury_absence
variables.description: The number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments where either Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner withdraws or is significantly compromised by injury before the semi-finals.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: crl_q4_2025_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The percentage difference between Charles River Laboratories' reported earnings per share (EPS) for Q4 2025 and the consensus analyst estimate, which typically occurs around early February.

variables.name: crl_2026_guidance_revision
variables.description: The direction of management's full-year 2026 revenue and earnings guidance compared to previous estimates during the February earnings call.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, reflecting broader market sentiment.

variables.name: biotech_sector_momentum
variables.description: The performance of the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) relative to the broader market during the first week of February 2026, indicating sector-specific health.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: brent_price_start
variables.description: The closing price of Brent crude oil on 2026-02-01 (or the nearest preceding trading day if the 1st is a weekend).

variables.name: opec_plus_production_change
variables.description: The net change in planned daily production levels announced or implemented by OPEC+ leading into the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_disruption
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant supply disruption event (e.g., conflict, infrastructure attack) in a major oil-producing region between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: weekly_inventory_drawdown
variables.description: The change in global or US commercial crude oil inventories reported during the forecast week; a negative value indicates a drawdown which typically supports price increases.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: synoptic_pattern_warming_trend
variables.description: Whether the regional synoptic weather pattern over Central France shows a shift from a cold-air mass (e.g., Siberian high) on Feb 1 to a warmer mass (e.g., Atlantic maritime air) by Feb 8.

variables.name: temp_difference_value
variables.description: The numerical difference between the average temperature on Feb 8 and Feb 1 (Feb 8 temp minus Feb 1 temp).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: initial_elo_rating
variables.description: The Elo rating of R Praggnanandhaa according to the Wikipedia FIDE rankings page as of February 1, 2026.

variables.name: games_played_period
variables.description: The number of FIDE-rated games played by Praggnanandhaa between the publication of the January 2026 and February 2026 lists (typically reflected in the Feb 1st update).

variables.name: rating_change_magnitude
variables.description: The net change in Elo points required to achieve at least a 1% increase from the February 1st baseline.

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_update_status
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page is updated with the official February 2026 FIDE rating list data by February 8, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The weekly percentage return of the S&P 500 index from February 1 to February 8, 2026, reflecting broad market sentiment.

variables.name: xom_earnings_surprise_q4_2025
variables.description: The earnings per share (EPS) surprise (actual vs. consensus) for XOM's Q4 2025 earnings report, typically released in early February.

variables.name: energy_sector_relative_strength
variables.description: The ratio of the Energy Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLE) performance relative to the S&P 500 during the first week of February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price
variables.description: The stock price of Tesla (TSLA) in USD, adjusted for splits, which accounts for the majority of Musk's net worth.

variables.name: spacex_valuation
variables.description: The estimated private market valuation of SpaceX, a significant component of Musk's wealth.

variables.name: musk_equity_ownership_percentage
variables.description: The total percentage of equity Musk maintains in his primary companies (Tesla, SpaceX, xAI) after accounting for potential stock sales or dilution.

variables.name: musk_pay_package_restoration
variables.description: Whether Elon Musk's 2018 Tesla compensation package (or an equivalent replacement) remains legally valid and fully granted by the resolution date.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many fatalities in Niue for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,fatalities
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of fatalities over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more fatalities would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_fatalities_sum
variables.description: The total number of ACLED-recorded fatalities in Niue during the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01.

variables.name: threshold_fatalities_required
variables.description: The calculated threshold (10 * (1 + (historical_fatalities_sum / 12))) that must be exceeded for the question to resolve positively.

variables.name: major_violent_event_occurrence
variables.description: Occurrence of any event classified as Battle, Explosion/Remote violence, or Violence against civilians in Niue during the target 30-day period.

variables.name: target_period_fatalities
variables.description: The total number of fatalities recorded by ACLED in Niue for the 30 days before 2026-03-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more 'Battles' in Taiwan for the 30 days before 2026-03-08 compared to the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: (1+2)/12=0.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 1 or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battles
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded in Taiwan by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-03-01.

variables.name: cross_strait_kinetic_escalation
variables.description: Occurrence of direct military engagement or armed skirmishes between PRC and ROC forces resulting in ACLED-categorized Battles.

variables.name: domestic_armed_clashes
variables.description: Occurrence of violent interactions between domestic organized armed groups (e.g., insurgent, paramilitary, or organized crime vs state forces) in Taiwan.

variables.name: forecast_period_battles
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded in Taiwan by ACLED during the 30-day period from 2026-02-06 to 2026-03-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the weekly value of central bank liquidity swaps held by the Federal Reserve have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: global_usd_funding_stress
variables.description: A measure of global demand for US dollar liquidity among foreign central banks, often indicated by the spread between the USD Libor (or SOFR) and the OIS rate.

variables.name: major_central_bank_drawdowns
variables.description: The total amount of new swap line drawdowns initiated by major central banks (ECB, BoJ, BoE, SNB, BoC) during the week ending 2026-03-04.

variables.name: maturing_swap_contracts
variables.description: The total value of existing central bank liquidity swap contracts that are scheduled to mature and be settled between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08.

variables.name: net_swap_position_change
variables.description: The net change (New Drawdowns minus Maturing Contracts) in the outstanding balance of central bank liquidity swaps held by the Fed.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Sacramento Kings have the worst record in the NBA?

variables.name: kings_remaining_win_percentage
variables.description: The Sacramento Kings' winning percentage for the remaining games in the 2025-2026 season after March 1st.

variables.name: kings_star_player_availability
variables.description: The total percentage of games played by De'Aaron Fox and Domantas Sabonis during the 2025-2026 season up to resolution.

variables.name: league_floor_win_total
variables.description: The final number of wins achieved by the team with the second-worst record in the NBA.

variables.name: kings_roster_reconstruction_status
variables.description: Whether the Sacramento Kings front office traded away multiple core starters for draft assets or expiring contracts prior to the 2026 trade deadline.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: blockade_persistence_months
variables.description: The number of months between March 2026 and June 2026 that JNIM maintains a total or near-total economic blockade on Bamako, preventing fuel and food from reaching the capital by road.

variables.name: africa_corps_withdrawal
variables.description: Whether a significant portion (over 50%) of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel are withdrawn from Bamako or the surrounding Koulikoro region, significantly weakening the capital's defense.

variables.name: jnim_mobilization_strength
variables.description: The total number of JNIM-affiliated combatants actively mobilized for a direct assault on the Bamako metropolitan area, measured in thousands of fighters.

variables.name: collapse_of_central_authority
variables.description: Whether the Malian military leadership (FAMa) or the transition government under Assimi Goïta effectively collapses or abandons the capital city center due to internal mutiny, coup, or inability to pay and supply troops.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will any branch of the U.S. military have hypersonic weapons operationally deployed with field units, aboard naval vessels, or on aircraft by 30 April 2026?

variables.name: dark_eagle_missile_delivery
variables.description: The percentage of the required 'all-up-round' (AUR) missiles delivered to the 5th Battalion, 3rd Field Artillery Regiment by February 2026.

variables.name: ioc_certification_approval
variables.description: Whether the U.S. Army senior leadership (Secretary of the Army or Chief of Staff) officially grants Initial Operational Capability (IOC) certification for the Long-Range Hypersonic Weapon (LRHW) system.

variables.name: successful_lrhw_flight_tests
variables.description: The total number of successful end-to-end flight tests of the Dark Eagle / LRHW system conducted between March 2025 and April 2026.

variables.name: combatant_commander_tasking_readiness
variables.description: Whether the first hypersonic battery is confirmed as 'available for operational tasking' by a U.S. Combatant Commander (e.g., INDOPACKOM) in official status reports.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Roland Garros Airport will be higher on 2026-03-08 than on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: avg_temp_march_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Roland Garros Airport (Gillot) on March 1, 2026.

variables.name: temp_difference_march_08_vs_01
variables.description: The difference in average temperature between March 8 and March 1, 2026 (T_08 - T_01).

variables.name: cyclone_activity_impact
variables.description: Whether a tropical cyclone or significant tropical depression passes near Reunion Island between March 1 and March 8, 2026, causing a significant drop in temperature.

variables.name: seasonal_climatological_trend
variables.description: The historical average change in temperature between the first and second week of March at this station (usually near zero or slightly cooling as the austral summer peaks).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Silver (SI) hit (LOW) $60 by end of June?

variables.name: silver_price_june_start
variables.description: The official CME settlement price for the Silver (SI) Active Month on the first trading day of June 2026.

variables.name: silver_price_reached_sixty
variables.description: Has the Silver (SI) settlement price reached a level of at least $60.00 at any point between March 1, 2026, and the end of June 2026?

variables.name: maximum_silver_drawdown_percentage
variables.description: The maximum percentage decline from the period peak price to the period low price for Silver (SI) Active Month settlement prices between March 1 and June 30, 2026.

variables.name: silver_settlement_below_sixty
variables.description: Whether the official CME settlement price for the Active Month of Silver (SI) futures is recorded at or below $60.00 on at least one trading day within the specified window.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the effective yield of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by 2026-03-08 as compared to its value on 2026-03-01?

variables.name: us_10_year_treasury_yield_change
variables.description: The change in the 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Rate between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, which serves as the risk-free benchmark for corporate debt yields.

variables.name: ice_bofa_b_option_adjusted_spread_change
variables.description: The change in the option-adjusted spread (OAS) for B-rated corporate bonds between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, representing the risk premium required by investors.

variables.name: vix_index_weekly_trend
variables.description: The change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) over the week, which correlates with corporate credit spreads and overall market risk sentiment.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_hike_occurrence
variables.description: Whether a Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting or an unscheduled announcement results in a hike to the federal funds rate target range during the specified week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Pneumonia by 2026-03-08?

variables.name: pneumococcal_vaccine_status
variables.description: Whether the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page identifies a vaccine as 'Yes' or equivalent for Pneumonia (specifically pneumococcal pneumonia) by the target date.

variables.name: wikipedia_page_updates
variables.description: The number of edits made to the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page in the 12 months preceding the target date to ensure data freshness.

variables.name: new_broad_spectrum_vaccine_approval
variables.description: Whether a novel, broad-spectrum vaccine targeting all major causes of pneumonia (viral, bacterial, fungal) has received WHO or FDA approval by early 2026.

variables.name: pathogen_specific_vaccine_count
variables.description: The current number of major pneumonia-causing pathogens (e.g., S. pneumoniae, H. influenzae) that have widely available, Wikipedia-recognized vaccines.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will HPE's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: hpe_q1_fy26_earnings_beat
variables.description: Whether HPE's Q1 FY2026 earnings report, typically released in late Feb or early March, beats analyst consensus expectations for EPS and revenue.

variables.name: hpe_fy26_guidance_revision
variables.description: The percentage change in HPE's full-year 2026 revenue guidance provided during the Q1 FY2026 earnings call compared to previous estimates.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage price return of the S&P 500 index from the close of 2026-03-01 to the close of 2026-03-08, reflecting broader market sentiment.

variables.name: hpe_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of HPE stock as of 2026-03-01, indicating if the stock is overbought or oversold leading into the target week.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: high_level_defense_summits
variables.description: The number of official multilateral defense or security summits involving at least three target MENA states held between March 2026 and June 2026.

variables.name: formal_draft_agreement_consensus
variables.description: Whether a draft memorandum of understanding (MoU) or treaty text on security has reached consensus among the foreign or defense ministers of at least three target MENA states.

variables.name: regional_threat_escalation_index
variables.description: A subjective measure of perceived shared security threats (e.g., maritime instability, non-state actor aggression) that necessitates a coordinated response among target states (1 = low, 10 = extreme).

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_frequency
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three target MENA states occurring in the six months prior to June 2026, serving as a precursor to formal pacts.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Germany become more authoritarian in 2025?

variables.name: germany_2024_democracy_score
variables.description: The baseline democracy score for Germany in the 2024 Economist Intelligence Unit report (published in early 2025).

variables.name: civil_liberties_score_delta
variables.description: The change in the 'Civil liberties' sub-score for Germany in the 2025 report compared to 2024; a negative value indicates a decline.

variables.name: political_culture_stability
variables.description: The change in the 'Political culture' sub-score for Germany in the 2025 report, often affected by the rise of extremist parties or social polarization.

variables.name: functioning_of_government_score
variables.description: The specific sub-score for 'Functioning of government' in the 2025 report, reflecting effective policy-making and lack of corruption.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08, representing broader market beta.

variables.name: blk_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) for BlackRock stock on 2026-03-01, indicating if the stock is overbought or oversold prior to the observation week.

variables.name: financial_sector_performance
variables.description: The week-over-week price change of the Financial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLF) from 2026-03-01 to 2026-03-08, reflecting sector-specific tailwinds.

variables.name: vix_volatility_index
variables.description: The closing level of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) on 2026-03-01; high volatility typically correlates with downward pressure on asset manager stocks.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market capitalization for USDT & USDC stablecoins surpass $300 billion USD by June 30, 2026?

variables.name: crypto_market_cap_total
variables.description: The total market capitalization of all cryptocurrencies, which historically correlates with stablecoin demand for liquidity and trading.

variables.name: stablecoin_dominance_ratio
variables.description: The combined market capitalization of USDT and USDC as a percentage of the total cryptocurrency market cap.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_june_2026
variables.description: The upper bound of the Federal Funds Rate, which influences the yield on the reserves backing USDT and USDC and the opportunity cost of holding them.

variables.name: major_regulatory_enforcement_action
variables.description: Whether a major US regulatory action (e.g., from SEC or DOJ) or a restrictive legislative ban targeting either Tether or Circle occurs before the deadline.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Dominican Republic win the 2026 World Baseball Classic?

variables.name: dr_roster_star_participation
variables.description: The percentage of the top 20 Dominican MLB players (by 2025 WAR) who are on the active 2026 WBC roster, indicating the strength of the squad.

variables.name: dr_advancement_to_semifinals
variables.description: Whether the Dominican Republic successfully advances through the group stage and the quarterfinals to reach the final four of the tournament.

variables.name: dr_pitching_era_tournament
variables.description: The collective Earned Run Average (ERA) of the Dominican Republic pitching staff during the tournament, critical for surviving the knockout stages.

variables.name: dr_championship_game_appearance
variables.description: Whether the Dominican Republic wins their semifinal match to advance to the WBC Championship game.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Bank of England decreases interest rates by 25 bps after March 2026 meeting?

variables.name: uk_cpi_inflation_feb_2026
variables.description: The year-on-year Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate for the UK as reported for February 2026, which influences the MPC's mandate for price stability.

variables.name: pre_march_bank_rate
variables.description: The official Bank Rate set by the Bank of England immediately prior to the March 2026 meeting; a higher rate provides more room for a 25 bps cut.

variables.name: mpc_dovish_majority
variables.description: Whether at least 5 of the 9 members of the Monetary Policy Committee vote for a reduction in interest rates at the March 2026 meeting.

variables.name: uk_gdp_growth_q4_2025
variables.description: The quarterly GDP growth rate for the UK in the final quarter of 2025; weak or negative growth increases the likelihood of a rate cut to stimulate the economy.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Explosions/Remote violence' in Sao Tome and Principe for the 30 days before 2026-03-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the 360 days preceding 2026-03-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Explosions/Remote violence'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Explosions/Remote violence' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Explosions/Remote violence' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Sao Tome and Principe recorded by ACLED during the 360-day period preceding 2026-03-15.

variables.name: calculated_target_threshold
variables.description: The required number of events in the target 30-day window to resolve positively, calculated as 10 * (1 + (historical_360_day_count / 12)).

variables.name: target_period_event_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Explosions/Remote violence' events in Sao Tome and Principe recorded by ACLED during the 30 days before 2026-03-22.

variables.name: severe_political_instability_or_coup
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant breakdown in political order, such as a coup attempt or intense civil unrest, involving the use of explosives or remote weaponry during the target period.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Troyes-Barberey Airport will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: avg_temp_2026_03_15
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Troyes-Barberey Airport on March 15, 2026.

variables.name: avg_temp_2026_03_22
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Troyes-Barberey Airport on March 22, 2026.

variables.name: seasonal_warming_trend
variables.description: The climatological average increase in daily mean temperature at Troyes between March 15 and March 22 based on historical norms.

variables.name: synoptic_pattern_shift
variables.description: The difference in temperature caused by the specific weather systems (e.g., passage of a warm front or cold air mass) present on March 22 compared to March 15.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Ajaccio will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: ajaccio_temp_2026_03_15
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Ajaccio weather station on March 15, 2026.

variables.name: ajaccio_temp_2026_03_22
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Ajaccio weather station on March 22, 2026.

variables.name: climatological_warming_trend_march
variables.description: The average increase in daily mean temperature at Ajaccio between mid-March and late-March based on historical climatology (approx. 0.05-0.1C per day).

variables.name: synoptic_weather_variability_impact
variables.description: The magnitude of temperature fluctuation caused by passing weather systems (fronts/pressure systems) on March 22 compared to the seasonal mean.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 4-week moving average of initial unemployment claims have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: ic_value_2026_03_21
variables.description: The seasonally adjusted initial unemployment claims for the week ending March 21, 2026.

variables.name: ic_value_2026_02_21
variables.description: The seasonally adjusted initial unemployment claims for the week ending February 21, 2026 (the week that drops out of the 4-week average).

variables.name: claims_differential
variables.description: The difference between the initial claims for the week ending 2026-03-21 and the week ending 2026-02-21; a positive value indicates the 4-week moving average will increase.

variables.name: labor_market_tightness_index
variables.description: A proxy for the state of the labor market in Q1 2026, where higher values indicate cooling and higher likelihood of rising claims.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the 30-day average of the Federal Reserve's Secured Overnight Financing Rate have increased by 2026-03-22 as compared to its value on 2026-03-15?

variables.name: daily_sofr_2026_03_21
variables.description: The daily Secured Overnight Financing Rate (SOFR) on March 21, 2026, or the most recent preceding business day, which replaces the rate from 30 days prior in the rolling average calculation.

variables.name: daily_sofr_30d_prior
variables.description: The daily SOFR rate approximately 30 days prior to March 22, 2026 (around February 20, 2026), which is the value being rolled out of the 30-day average window.

variables.name: fomc_target_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the Federal Open Market Committee's target range for the federal funds rate between February 15, 2026, and March 22, 2026, which directly influences SOFR.

variables.name: quarter_end_liquidity_pressure
variables.description: Whether significant upward pressure on repo rates is observed due to the approach of the Q1 2026 quarter-end, typically causing SOFR to deviate from the policy rate.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the average Arctic sea ice extent for March 2026 be the lowest on record for that month according to the National Snow and Ice Data Center (NSIDC)?

variables.name: february_2026_ice_extent
variables.description: The average Arctic sea ice extent for February 2026, which sets the starting state for the month of March.

variables.name: march_2026_arctic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The average Arctic Oscillation (AO) index for March 2026; negative phases often favor ice retention while positive phases can promote export and melting.

variables.name: march_surface_air_temperature_anomaly
variables.description: The average surface air temperature anomaly in the Arctic Circle (66.5°N+) during March 2026 relative to the 1981-2010 mean.

variables.name: march_2026_average_extent
variables.description: The final calculated average Arctic sea ice extent for March 2026; must be less than 14.10 to trigger a 'Yes' outcome.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: BTC  close above 80K by end of March?

variables.name: daily_btc_volatility
variables.description: The maximum percentage price movement for Bitcoin in a single 24-hour period between March 29 and March 31, 2026.

variables.name: btc_price_march_29
variables.description: The current price of Bitcoin as of the start of the forecasting window on March 29, 2026.

variables.name: break_73k_resistance
variables.description: Whether Bitcoin price breaks and sustains above the critical $73,300 resistance level before the end of March 31.

variables.name: institutional_buy_pressure
variables.description: Whether there is a significant net positive inflow into Bitcoin ETFs or major corporate buys exceeding $500M in the final 48 hours of March.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will DOC's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: vn_real_estate_sector_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the Vanguard Real Estate ETF (VNQ) between market close on 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22, serving as a proxy for broader REIT sector trends.

variables.name: ten_year_treasury_yield_delta
variables.description: The absolute change in the 10-Year Treasury Note yield during the observation week; REITs like DOC are highly sensitive to interest rate fluctuations.

variables.name: doc_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) for DOC on 2026-03-15; a low RSI (oversold) often precedes a price increase, while a high RSI (overbought) may precede a drop.

variables.name: major_healthcare_reit_news_event
variables.description: The occurrence of a significant company-specific or healthcare-sector news event (e.g., earnings pre-announcement, major acquisition, or regulatory change) between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Anthropic be a designated supply chain risk on May 1, 2026?

variables.name: lawsuit_filed_by_anthropic
variables.description: Whether Anthropic files a lawsuit seeking a preliminary injunction or temporary restraining order against the supply chain risk designation before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: judicial_stay_issued
variables.description: Whether a U.S. federal court issues a stay, preliminary injunction, or other order suspending the enforcement of the Secretary of War's designation prior to May 1, 2026.

variables.name: administrative_designation_reversal
variables.description: Whether the Department of War or the White House officially rescinds the supply chain risk designation or the executive directive before May 1, 2026.

variables.name: days_to_injunction_ruling
variables.description: The number of days between the filing of a legal challenge by Anthropic and a court's ruling on a preliminary injunction. A high value suggests the designation remains in effect on May 1.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will China, Russia, the U.S., or the EU publicly announce new economic or trade sanctions that specifically target a state-owned oil or gas entity in Egypt, Jordan, or the United Arab Emirates (UAE) by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: geopolitical_escalation_threshold
variables.description: Occurrence of a major geopolitical event involving Egypt, Jordan, or the UAE (e.g., sanctions evasion for Russia/Iran, or direct involvement in a regional conflict) that triggers a formal sanctions review by the U.S., EU, China, or Russia.

variables.name: secondary_sanctions_linkage
variables.description: Evidence of a state-owned oil or gas entity in the target countries facilitating transactions or logistics for currently sanctioned regimes (like Russia or Iran) at a scale that warrants diplomatic retaliation.

variables.name: sanctioning_power_consensus
variables.description: The number of the four specified powers (U.S., EU, Russia, China) that identify a strategic necessity to penalize the energy sectors of Egypt, Jordan, or the UAE before the deadline.

variables.name: diplomatic_failure_index
variables.description: A measure of the breakdown in bilateral diplomatic negotiations regarding energy policy or sanctions compliance between the sanctioning powers and the target countries; 0 is total cooperation, 10 is total breakdown.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Isosporiasis by 2026-03-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_phase_iii_completion
variables.description: Whether a vaccine for Isosporiasis has successfully completed Phase III clinical trials by early 2026.

variables.name: regulatory_approval_status
variables.description: Whether a national or international regulatory body (e.g., FDA, EMA) has granted marketing authorization for an Isosporiasis vaccine.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_column_update
variables.description: Whether the 'Vaccine' column for Isosporiasis on the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page has been updated to 'Yes' or a specific vaccine name.

variables.name: active_research_programs_count
variables.description: The number of active clinical research programs specifically targeting a human vaccine for Cystoisospora belli (formerly Isospora belli).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Solana reach $100 in March?

variables.name: sol_price_start_march
variables.description: The price of Solana (SOL/USDT) on Binance at the start of March 2026.

variables.name: sol_march_peak_ratio
variables.description: The ratio of the highest price reached in March to the price at the start of March.

variables.name: crypto_market_bullishness
variables.description: Whether the overall cryptocurrency market (proxied by BTC/ETH) is in a significant uptrend during March 2026.

variables.name: solana_network_uptime
variables.description: Whether the Solana mainnet maintains 100% uptime without major outages during the month of March 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will VTRS's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: market_sentiment_index_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22, serving as a proxy for broad market momentum.

variables.name: vtrs_relative_strength
variables.description: The ratio of Viatris (VTRS) stock performance compared to the SPDR S&P Pharmaceuticals ETF (XPH) during the forecast week.

variables.name: healthcare_sector_volatility
variables.description: The realized volatility of the healthcare sector (XLV) in the 5 business days leading up to and including the target period.

variables.name: significant_corporate_news_event
variables.description: Whether Viatris (VTRS) releases a material news event (e.g., FDA approval, revised earnings guidance, or M&A announcement) between 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_issued
variables.description: Whether a formal federal indictment is unsealed by the Department of Justice against Barack Obama before July 2026.

variables.name: doj_leadership_approval
variables.description: The probability that the Attorney General or Acting Attorney General authorizes the arrest of a former president, given the extreme political and legal precedents.

variables.name: special_counsel_appointment
variables.description: Whether a Special Counsel is specifically appointed to investigate and prosecute the 'treasonous conspiracy' allegations involving Obama.

variables.name: evidence_sufficiency_threshold
variables.description: A subjective measure of the strength of evidence presented by the DNI/DOJ to a grand jury, where 10 is an undeniable case and 0 is purely political rhetoric.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: ovx_initial_value
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (OVX) on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: crude_oil_price_volatility
variables.description: The realized daily percentage change in front-month WTI crude oil futures between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant supply disruption or geopolitical escalation in a major oil-producing region during the forecast week.

variables.name: ovx_final_value
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (OVX) on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role, a primary precursor to the Oscar.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role, which often indicates strong international and Academy voter support.

variables.name: oscar_odds_ranking
variables.description: Wagner Moura's implied rank among the five nominees based on betting markets and expert aggregation sites (e.g., GoldDerby) as of March 1, 2026. A rank of 1 indicates he is the favorite.

variables.name: chalamet_win_probability
variables.description: The estimated probability that Timothée Chalamet (the primary competitor in this scenario) wins the Best Actor Oscar for 'Marty Supreme'.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: p5_consensus_on_draft
variables.description: The degree to which the five permanent members of the UNSC (P5) reach a consensus on the text of a draft resolution regarding Sudan, avoiding a veto from Russia or China.

variables.name: un_humanitarian_crisis_severity
variables.description: The number of people in Sudan estimated by the UN to be in need of urgent humanitarian assistance by April 2026.

variables.name: formal_ceasefire_negotiations_active
variables.description: Whether a formal mediation process (e.g., Jeddah talks or AU-led process) is actively proposing a draft ceasefire agreement to the UNSC for endorsement before May 2026.

variables.name: unsc_sudan_resolutions_count
variables.description: The number of substantive (non-technical rollover) UNSC resolutions passed regarding Sudan in the 12 months preceding May 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_2026
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially confirmed and permitted to compete in the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 by the EBU.

variables.name: israel_qualifies_for_final
variables.description: Whether the Israeli entry successfully qualifies from the semi-finals to the Grand Final of Eurovision 2026.

variables.name: israel_televote_score_rank
variables.description: The rank of Israel in the public televote during the Grand Final (where 1 is the highest score).

variables.name: israel_jury_score_rank
variables.description: The rank of Israel in the professional jury vote during the Grand Final (where 1 is the highest score).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_ranking_top_3
variables.description: Whether an Alibaba Qwen model is ranked in the top 3 overall on the Chatbot Arena Leaderboard as of February 1, 2026.

variables.name: qwen_arena_score_delta
variables.description: The difference in Arena Score between the top Alibaba model and the current global leader as of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: us_export_control_impact
variables.description: Whether new US export controls implemented between 2025 and Feb 2026 significantly restricted Alibaba's access to H100/B200 equivalent compute for training.

variables.name: competitor_major_release_count
variables.description: The number of flagship model releases (e.g., GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2) by OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google between March 2025 and February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_protests
variables.description: Total number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan recorded by ACLED in the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15.

variables.name: implied_resolution_threshold
variables.description: The calculated threshold (10 * (1 + (historical_360_day_protests / 12))) that actual protests must exceed for a positive resolution.

variables.name: target_period_protest_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Protests' in Azerbaijan recorded by ACLED during the 30-day window from 2026-01-23 to 2026-02-21.

variables.name: major_civil_unrest_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant national trigger (e.g., disputed election, economic crisis, or major territorial conflict escalation) causing a surge in public demonstrations.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: temp_brest_2026_02_15
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Brest-Guipavas station on 2026-02-15

variables.name: temp_brest_2026_02_22
variables.description: Daily average temperature at Brest-Guipavas station on 2026-02-22

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The state of the NAO index in late February 2026, which influences the transport of warm maritime air into Brittany

variables.name: weekly_temp_trend_february
variables.description: The difference in average daily temperature at Brest between February 22 and February 15 (T22 - T15) based on climatological 30-year normals

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the ECB deposit facility rate (DFR) between the two dates, which typically sets the floor for the €STR.

variables.name: ecb_monetary_policy_meeting_held
variables.description: Whether a Governing Council monetary policy meeting occurs between February 15 and February 22, 2026, which could lead to a rate change.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_trend
variables.description: The change in the level of excess liquidity in the Eurosystem (measured in trillions of EUR); lower liquidity tends to push €STR closer to the DFR.

variables.name: estr_spread_to_dfr
variables.description: The spread of the €STR relative to the ECB deposit facility rate on the target date; usually negative and stable around -10 basis points.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The change in the target range for the federal funds rate by the FOMC between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: market_inflation_expectations
variables.description: The 1-year breakeven inflation rate as of 2026-02-22, reflecting short-term inflation sentiment which influences the 3-month yield.

variables.name: t_bill_net_issuance
variables.description: The net change in the outstanding volume of 3-month Treasury bills issued by the US Treasury during the week ending 2026-02-22.

variables.name: daily_yield_volatility
variables.description: The standard deviation of daily changes in the 3-month yield during the week preceding 2026-02-22, indicating the likelihood of a trend reversal.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: phase_1_clinical_trials_completion
variables.description: Whether a Heartland virus vaccine candidate has successfully completed Phase 1 human clinical trials by August 2025.

variables.name: fda_fast_track_designation
variables.description: Whether the FDA has granted Fast Track or Breakthrough Therapy designation to any Heartland virus vaccine candidate by late 2025.

variables.name: cumulative_hrtv_case_count
variables.description: The total number of laboratory-confirmed Heartland virus (HRTV) cases reported in the US, indicating public health urgency for vaccine development.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_status_entry
variables.description: Whether the specific Wikipedia article 'List of infectious diseases' or its linked subpages explicitly list a vaccine as available or approved for Heartland virus.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: chikunova_current_record_time
variables.description: The world record time for the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) held by Evgeniia Chikunova as of February 2026.

variables.name: major_championships_before_resolution
variables.description: The number of World Aquatics sanctioned international long course championships (e.g., World Aquatics Championships 2025) occurring between Feb 2025 and Feb 2026 where the record could be broken.

variables.name: faster_ratified_performance_exists
variables.description: Whether a swimmer other than Chikunova has achieved a time faster than 2:17.55 in a long course 200m breaststroke event that has been ratified or is pending ratification by World Aquatics prior to Feb 22, 2026.

variables.name: wikipedia_update_latency
variables.description: The probability that Wikipedia's 'List of world records in swimming' page is updated within 7 days of a new world record being set.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: weekly_return_sp500
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-13 and 2026-02-20, representing overall market sentiment.

variables.name: macau_gaming_revenue_trend
variables.description: The month-over-month growth rate of Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) in Macau for the period leading into February 2026, which drives LVS's largest revenue segment.

variables.name: lvs_beta_adjusted_volatility
variables.description: The expected volatility of LVS relative to the market for a 5-trading day window, determining the magnitude of price swings needed to exceed the baseline price.

variables.name: negative_macro_shocks_china
variables.description: The occurrence of significant adverse regulatory or economic policy changes in China/Macau during the specific week of February 15-22, 2026, that would depress gaming stocks.
